function_v0.doc:
Initializes the CctpForwarder contract.

# Arguments

* `env` - Access to the Soroban environment.
* `params` - Initialization parameters including roles and contract addresses.

# Events

Emits role configuration events for all roles.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Mints tokens via CCTP and forwards them to the forward recipient.

This function calls `receive_message` on the MessageTransmitter to mint tokens
to this contract, then forwards them to the recipient specified in the hook data.

# Arguments

* `e` - Access to the Soroban environment.
* `message` - The CCTP message bytes.
* `attestation` - The attestation bytes for the message.

# Errors

* `HostError: Error(Contract, #1000)` \xe2\x80\x93 Contract is paused (`EnforcedPaused`).
* [`CctpForwarderError::InvalidMessageFormat`] \xe2\x80\x93 The message format is invalid.
* [`CctpForwarderError::UnsupportedMessageVersion`] \xe2\x80\x93 The message version is not supported.
* [`CctpForwarderError::InvalidBurnMessageFormat`] \xe2\x80\x93 The burn message format is invalid.
* [`CctpForwarderError::UnsupportedBurnMessageVersion`] \xe2\x80\x93 The burn message version is not supported.
* [`CctpForwarderError::InvalidMintRecipient`] \xe2\x80\x93 The mintRecipient is not this contract.
* [`CctpForwarderError::InvalidRecipient`] \xe2\x80\x93 The recipient is not the TokenMessengerMinte
function_v0.name: mint_and_forward

udt_struct_v0.doc: Initialization parameters for the CctpForwarder contract.
udt_struct_v0.name: CctpForwarderContractInitParams

The MessageTransmitter contract address.

function_v0.name: get_expected_burn_msg_version

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Represents a pair of decimal configurations for local and canonical tokens.

This configuration is used to handle decimal precision differences between
tokens on different chains (e.g., Stellar USDC with 7 decimals vs CCTP with 6 decimals).
udt_struct_v0.name: TokenDecimalConfig

fields.doc: Number of decimals for the canonical token (e.g., 6 for standard CCTP)
fields.name: canonical_decimals

fields.doc: Number of decimals for the local token (e.g., 7 for Stellar USDC)
fields.name: local_decimals
